q: In which century did Leiria host one of Portugal's first printing presses?
exp: Books were printed in Leiria as early as the 1490s.

q: What kind of pioneering books were printed in Leiria in the late 15th century?
exp: Leiria had one of the country's first presses, printing Hebrew books in the 1490s.

q: Which astronomy and navigation work by Abraham Zacuto was printed in Leiria in 1496?
In which year did major wildfires destroy much of the Pinhal de Leiria?
exp: The October 2017 fires burned most of the King's Pine Forest.

q: What was Leiria's strategic importance in the Middle Ages?
a: A frontier stronghold against the Moors
opts: A frontier stronghold against the Moors
exp: The castle guarded the frontier during the Christian Reconquista.

q: Which district of Leiria suffered a tragic wildfire in June 2017?
exp: The Pedrógão Grande fire was one of the deadliest in Portugal.

q: Besides timber, what product was harvested from the pines of Leiria?
exp: Pine resin was used in varnishes, glues and other products.

q: Which town in the Leiria district is famous for the giant wave surfed at Praia do Norte?
exp: Praia do Norte in Nazaré hosts big-wave surfing world records.
